body.title: Classifier: in_flight palace node flags via bus listener
body.result: stamp_in_flight/clear_in_flight on ClassifierDevice; BuilderReport.warnings field; wired into cmd_dispatch + cmd_next + cmd_close
body.intention: I intend that palace.codebase nodes are flagged in_flight when a ticket moves to in_progress so builder reports surface contention warnings.
body.description:
Classifier device listens on bus for ticket state transitions (claimed → in_progress, in_progress → closed). On in_progress: stamp palace.codebase nodes for affected_files with metadata in_flight=true, ticket=T-xxx. On close: clear flags. BuilderReport freshness_check() includes warning when relevant_files overlap with in_flight nodes.

**Affected files:** devices/classifier/device.py (bus listener), devices/classifier/report.py (warning field)
**Design rules:** log every interface crossing; bus envelope pattern
**Scope boundary:** In scope: bus listener + in_flight stamps + BuilderReport warnings. Out of scope: contention resolution, blocking dispatch.
**Completion criteria:** T-classifier-inflight-flags is CLOSED; `SELECT metadata->>'in_flight' FROM clan.memories WHERE path LIKE 'palace.codebase.%' AND metadata->>'in_flight' = 'true'` returns rows after test ticket transitions to in_progress; rows cleared on ticket close; BuilderReport includes warnings field when overlap detected.
